title: Order Additional IPs
ip_version_description: For a number of cases, you may need a standard IPv4, the most commonly used, or a new version of the protocol - IPv6. Please note that the list of compatible products may vary.
ipv4_card_description: Standard Internet (as of today). The most commonly used addressing protocol on the Internet, therefore the most commonly supported.
ipv6_card_description: When large IP blocks are needed and a hierarchical addressing scheme is defined, IPv6 is the best choice. Ensure that all your clients are able to use the new protocol as well as your services
service_selection_title: Select the service for which you wish to purchase Additional IPs
region_selection_title: Select a region for your new Additional IP
additional_ip_block_card_description: IPv4 address block. Available block sizes vary depending on the associated service.
geolocation_selection_description: Please choose one of the available locations for your new additional IPv4 address block.
geolocation_disabled_selection_descripti: Geolocation information cannot be modified for a single IP address.
organisation_selection_description: The organization represents the administrative entity that owns the IP address block and must be listed in the public WHOIS database (global registry of IP addresses and domain names). It includes the following contact details: name, type of RIR, and email address.
organisation_selection_description_no_or: Warning: if you do not link an organization, your OVHcloud account information (NIC identifier) will be used in the public ARIN WHOIS database for this IP block.
Warning: if you do not link an organization, OVHcloud company information will be used in the public RIPE WHOIS database for this IP block.
organisation_selection_info: The name of the organization associated with your IP address block and the corresponding contact information will appear in the public WHOIS database.
go_to_organisation_list_link_label: Click here to access organization management.
service_selection_ip_quota_exceeded_erro: The maximum quota of IPs has been reached for this server.
additional_options_selection_description: In many cases, you may need a standard IPv4, the most commonly used, or a new version of the protocol: IPv6. Please note that the list of compatible products may vary.
new_prefix_ipv6_card_description: Get your new IPv6 prefix to use in vRack services.
ipv6_limit_reached_error: The maximum number of additional IPv6 blocks has already been reached
ipv6_region_3_blocks_limit_reached_error: The maximum number of 3 additional IPv6 blocks has already been reached in the selected region. Please choose another region.
ipv6_region_already_used_error: You already have a block from the selected region in your vRack. Please choose another region.
